description: Couchbase Server cluster monitoring — covers Cluster/Node, Data (KV), Query (N1QL), Index (GSI), Search (FTS), Analytics (CBAS), Eventing, XDCR, Backup, and legacy couchbase-exporter metrics. Couchbase-branded styling.

options.content:
COUCHBASE Server Observability
Cluster · Data · Query · Index · Search · Analytics · Eventing · XDCR
Variables: $cluster / $node / $bucket
Source: Couchbase Prometheus endpoint

panels.title: Nodes Up
panels.description: Total Couchbase nodes reporting metrics in the selected cluster.

panels.title: Total Items
panels.description: Total documents (active vBuckets) across selected buckets.

panels.title: Query Req/sec
panels.description: N1QL request rate across all query nodes.

panels.title: Resident Ratio
panels.description: Average % of active items resident in memory. <50% indicates memory pressure.

panels.title: Cache Miss %
panels.description: Cache miss ratio = bg_fetches / get_ops. Lower is better.

panels.title: CPU Utilization per Node
panels.description: System CPU utilization on each Couchbase node (sys_cpu_utilization_rate).

panels.title: Memory Used per Node
panels.description: Actual memory used vs free on each node (sys_mem_*).

panels.title: Swap Usage
panels.description: Swap usage — non-zero values indicate memory pressure.

panels.title: Process CPU per Service (sysproc_cpu_utilization)
panels.description: Per-process CPU usage (memcached, indexer, n1ql, fts, eventing-producer …).

panels.title: Process RSS per Service (sysproc_mem_resident)
panels.description: Resident memory of each Couchbase service process.

panels.title: Operations / sec by op type
panels.description: kv_ops broken down by operation: get, set, delete, incr, decr, …

panels.title: Resident Ratio (active)
panels.description: Average resident ratio across selected buckets (active vBuckets).

title: Couchbase Server — Full Observability
